title: T-045 — UI: Material Demand dashboard (MRP netting + low-stock alerts + Create PO quick action)
prompt:
Build a read-only Material Demand dashboard at `/planning/material-demand` providing minimal MRP netting visibility.

Deliverable: Server Component page that aggregates per raw-material (RM):
- on_hand: SUM available stock from warehouse (lp_stock or equivalent view).
- in_transit: SUM open PO line qty NOT yet GRN'd.
- reserved: SUM open WO material reservations.
- net_position = on_hand + in_transit - reserved.
- reorder_point: threshold per item (read from a new `reorder_thresholds` config table keyed by tenant_id+product_id; columns: min_qty, reorder_qty, preferred_supplier_id).
- status badge: OK (net >= min), LOW (net < min and net + open_signals > min), CRITICAL (net < min and no signals).

Features:
- Filterable table: search by code/name, status filter chip group (All / OK / LOW / CRITICAL).
- Per-row `Create PO` quick action button — opens existing PLN-014 PO Fast-Flow Wizard (T-038) prefilled with: product, qty=reorder_qty, supplier=preferred_supplier_id (or default supplier from supplier_products.is_default).
- Per-row `Set threshold` action → small dialog editing min_qty / reorder_qty / preferred_supplier_id → upserts `reorder_thresholds` via Server Action.
- Aggregation runs on-request (read DB views); no caching layer in this task.

New schema (within scope): `reorder_thresholds` table — Drizzle pgTable with (id UUID PK, tenant_id, product_id FK, min_qty NUMERIC, reorder_qty NUMERIC, preferred_supplier_id UUID NULL, updated_at, updated_by). UNIQUE(tenant_id, product_id). Migration `0045_planning_reorder_thresholds.sql`.

Server Actions (within scope): `listMaterialDemand` (read aggregator) and `upsertReorderThreshold`.

RBAC: `planning.material_demand.read` (default ON for planners) and `planning.thresholds.write` for upsert.

RED tests:
- Schema test: reorder_thresholds UNIQUE on (tenant_id, product_id).
- Aggregator integration test: 1 RM with on_hand=10, open PO=5, WO reservation=8, min=10 → net=7, status=LOW.
- RTL: status chip filters; Create PO button opens wizard prefilled (mock); Set threshold dialog upserts.

Do NOT implement full MRP run / pegging in this task. Do NOT modify wo_materials or po_lines tables. Do NOT cache aggregator results.

Close-out: paste RTL + integration test output, migration filename, screenshot path of dashboard.

pipeline_inputs.description: Read-only Material Demand dashboard with netting + reorder thresholds + Create PO quick action.
pipeline_inputs.details: Schema for reorder_thresholds, aggregator action joining stock/po/wo, Server Component page, Create PO opens existing PO wizard prefilled, threshold dialog upserts. No MRP pegging beyond simple sum.
acceptance_criteria: Given a product with on_hand=10, open PO=5, WO reservation=8, min=10, when listMaterialDemand runs, then net=7 and status='LOW'.
Given a product with on_hand=2, open PO=0, WO reservation=5, min=10, when listMaterialDemand runs, then status='CRITICAL'.
Given the user clicks Create PO on a row, when the wizard opens, then product, qty=reorder_qty, supplier=preferred_supplier_id are prefilled.
Given the user submits Set Threshold for an existing product, when committed, then reorder_thresholds upserts (UNIQUE(tenant,product) holds).
Given the user lacks planning.thresholds.write, when on the page, then Set threshold buttons are disabled with tooltips.
Given `pnpm vitest run` for the new tests, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED schema test for UNIQUE(tenant_id, product_id).
RED integration test seeding stock + PO + WO rows and asserting aggregator output.
RED RTL tests for status chip filter, Create PO prefill, threshold upsert.
Run `pnpm vitest run src/app/(planning)/material-demand` + `pnpm drizzle-kit generate`.
risk_red_lines: Do not introduce caching — must read live.
Do not duplicate the PO wizard — open the existing T-038 component.
Do not block other planning routes via schema migration ordering.
